ops.text: A Workflow-tool agent (lane C of the getaway-v2-fixes run, wf_607e4672-74b, label fix:plan-trip, model opus xhigh) completed "successfully" but returned only a system-prompt fragment as its result ("version: This tells you the Claude Code CLI version... Today's date is 2026-07-12") and performed zero file changes — parallel() surfaced it as a normal string result, not an error, so the failure was only caught downstream when git status showed its files untouched. A workflow agent whose result is a preamble fragment with zero tool calls should surface as an agent error (retry/null), not a plausible-looking string.
